replies.msg:
To live is an instinct; so is to protest.

Every civilized human being is empowered to protest against the injustice and fight for freedom, no matter how pessimistic he deems the situation.

We protest, we fight, and thus we live.

And we truly believe that hope can only be obtained by a persistent & persevering battle, not the other way around.
ON9 QUESTION
